title: hypolepis viscosa
intro: Hypolepis viscosa, also known as sticky fern, is a species of fern in the family Hypolepidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Hypolepis viscosa include alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a tea or infusion by steeping its fronds in hot water, or it can be dried and used in capsule or powder form for convenient consumption.
